title: Anti-Mace
description: A simple quality of life mod where turtle helmets negates mace falling attacks.
body:
![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3D9KVJGa0Q%26curseforge%3D1198033&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362)

Don't you think the mace is just too overpowered? This simple quality of life mod makes it so that wearing a turtle helmet negates mace falling attacks by redirecting all damage to the helmet. It also works on turtles!

[Minecraft Feedback Credit](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/25063389096333-Turtle-Helmet-blocks-Mace-attack)


## WHAT DOES THE MOD DO
This mod makes it that wearing a turtle helmet blocks all incoming damage from mace falling attacks. Rather, the damage that would have been normally taken on the player's health will be redirected to the turtle helmet's durability until the armor piece breaks. This also applies to mobs wearing a turtle helmet and turtles!
